Title: Fresh instance forces setup
Notes: Fresh private-org instance (port 3000, bragbit_org DB): / -> 307 -> /setup before any workspace existed. (Solo variant also implicitly true.)

Title: Solo setup creates a personal workspace
Notes: Fresh DB bragbit_setup, private-solo. Completed wizard (name/email/password/workspace/accent) in browser → owner created, signed in, lands on /dashboard. DB: organization type='personal', accent_color set, member role='owner'. No Members nav; /admin/members redirects to /admin (no members/invitations/roles UI).

Title: Org setup creates an organization workspace
Notes: Org wizard (name/email/password/org name/accent) created owner Ada Lovelace + WakeCap org, signed in, landed on /dashboard. /admin now exposes BOTH Branding + Members tabs (vs solo's branding-only TC-MEM-08).

Title: Setup token gate
Notes: Fresh DB + SETUP_TOKEN=mytoken123. Wizard submit with wrong token → 'Invalid setup token.' (stays on /setup, 0 orgs). Empty token blocked client-side (required) + same server guard. Correct token → succeeds (workspace created). /setup then redirects to / (closed).

Title: Setup closes permanently
Notes: After the org was created, /setup -> 307 redirect (wizard no longer reachable; can't create a second workspace).

Title: Root routes a signed-out visitor to sign-in
Notes: Signed out, / -> 307 -> /sign-in (root is a dispatcher, renders no page of its own).

Title: Root routes a signed-in visitor to the dashboard
Notes: Signed in, navigating to / -> /dashboard.

Title: Sign in with valid credentials
Notes: Signed in as demo@bragbit.local; redirected to /dashboard; chrome shows active workspace brand (Riley's, green).

Title: Verification required before sign-in
Notes: Created an unverified user via /api/auth/sign-up/email (works in solo; no UI). Sign-in -> 403 EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED. Verification required before sign-in.

Title: Wrong password rejected
Notes: Wrong password for demo@bragbit.local -> stayed on /sign-in (no session) with a generic 'Invalid email or password' (doesn't reveal whether the email exists).

Title: Verify email via link
Notes: Clicked the 'Verify your email' link from Mailpit -> 302, email_verified flips to t (auto sign-in), and a subsequent sign-in -> 200. Verify-via-link works.

Title: Resend verification
Notes: Fresh unverified user -> cleared mailbox -> POST /api/auth/send-verification-email -> {status:true}; a fresh 'Verify your email' mail arrived and its link verified (302, email_verified=true). Throwaway users cleaned up.

Title: Forgot → reset password
Notes: /forgot-password (gated to signed-out) -> "Reset your BragBit password" mail in Mailpit -> reset link -> set new password -> redirected to /sign-in. Old password rejected (stayed on /sign-in); new password reached /dashboard. Restored seed password via Settings.

Title: Reset link is single-use / time-bound
Notes: Re-opening the already-consumed reset link -> /reset-password?error=INVALID_TOKEN with "This reset link is invalid or has expired" and no password form. Token is single-use.

Title: OAuth button appears only when configured
Notes: Restarted solo server across env combos, checked rendered /sign-in. No creds→no button; GitHub both halves→"Continue with GitHub"; GitHub id-only→none; GitHub secret-only→none; Google both→"Continue with Google"; all four halves→both buttons. Driven by configuredOAuthProviders() (both-halves required). Dummy creds suffice (tests appearance, not handshake).

Title: OAuth signs in existing accounts only (private modes)
Notes: private-solo + real GitHub OAuth app (interactive login). NEGATIVE: unknown identity (no matching account) → /sign-in?error=signup_disabled, Better Auth logs 'signup_disabled', DB unchanged (no user, no github account row). POSITIVE: seeded verified account hamed.farag.2009@gmail.com → Continue with GitHub linked the github account (account_id 5382471) to the EXISTING user and signed in to /dashboard; no new user created. Note: with GitHub 'Keep my email private' ON, GitHub returns the noreply addr so primary-email match fails (link via noreply or from settings instead).

Title: Sign out
Notes: Clicked Sign out -> redirected to /sign-in. Navigating directly to /dashboard then bounced to /sign-in (session cleared, guard enforced). No email needed.

Title: Public sign-up disabled (private modes)
Notes: POST /api/auth/sign-up/email in private modes -> 403 EMAIL_PASSWORD_SIGN_UP_DISABLED, no user created (catch-all auth route guard, ENH-SEC-06). Re-confirmed live on a fresh org that the setup wizard + invite-accept still create users (server-side auth.api.signUpEmail bypasses the route). Hosted keeps open sign-up.

Title: Edit profile
Notes: /profile shows display name (Riley Chen), role (Staff Engineer), team (Platform), bio, avatar. Edited Bio, saved, reloaded -> persisted in DB. Restored to empty + re-saved. Header avatar reflects initials (RC).

Title: Avatar upload
Notes: Manual upload of a valid 120x120 PNG -> profiles.avatar_key set, file on disk, avatar shows the image in BOTH the profile circle and the header (replacing AL initials). Wrong-type is guarded client-side (input accept=image/png,jpeg,webp,gif) and server-side (IMAGE_MIME_EXT allowlist, code-verified); oversized >5MB not separately exercised.

Title: Avatar is session-gated
Notes: With a REAL uploaded avatar: /api/files/avatars/<key> served to the authed owner; the same URL with NO session -> 401. Avatar is member-session-gated, never public.

Title: Change email confirms from current inbox
Notes: Requested demo->demo2: DB email unchanged + "Confirm your new BragBit email" sent to CURRENT inbox (demo@). Clicking it left email unchanged and sent a 2nd "Verify your email" to the NEW address (demo2@); only after clicking THAT did email flip to demo2@. Reversed the full 2-step cycle back to demo@ (restored). NOTE: app does a stronger two-step (confirm-current + verify-new) than the doc's single-confirm wording — testing.md should be updated.

Title: Change password revokes other sessions
Notes: Two demo sessions (cookie jars). Changed password on session1 via /api/auth/change-password (app sends revokeOtherSessions:true; needs Origin header). After: session2 (other) get-session → revoked; old password sign-in 401, new 200; current session token rotated. Reset demo pw back to demobragbit (login verified).

Title: Delete account
Notes: Throwaway DB bragbit_del, full solo dataset. Wrong password → 400 INVALID_PASSWORD (nothing deleted). Correct password → 200; ALL tables 0 rows (user/account/session/member/profiles/organization/documents/brags/tags/brag_tags/attachments cascade). Instance returns to setup (/ → /setup, /setup 200). Avatar file purged; old session null. NOTE: attachment FILE orphaned on disk (rows cascade, files not purged by deleteUser unlike deleteDocument) — unreachable (404), storage-hygiene gap only.

Title: Admin invites by email + role
Notes: Invited member@bragbit.local as Member -> Pending invitations shows it (expires +7 days, Resend/Revoke). Mailpit: "You're invited to WakeCap on BragBit", branded WakeCap, tokenized /accept-invitation/<token> link.

Title: Accept invitation
Notes: Opened the link signed-out -> "Join WakeCap" with the email PRE-FILLED/bound to the invited address. Set name+password -> account created (email_verified=t, pre-verified), role=member, invitation=accepted, signed in. NOTE: the "Joining…" button didn't auto-redirect to /dashboard (minor post-accept UX glitch); membership succeeded server-side.

Title: No account without a valid token
Notes: Garbage token -> "Invitation unavailable… invalid, already used, or expired" page; NO registration form / password field. No open sign-up — only a valid token reaches the accept form.

Title: Expired invitation rejected
Notes: Inserted a pending invitation with expires_at in the past, then opened its accept link -> 'Invitation unavailable… invalid, already used, or expired', no form. Expired invitations are rejected. (Used a short-TTL/DB-expiry rather than waiting 7 days.)

Title: Used invitation not reusable
Notes: After acceptance, reopening the same link -> "Invitation unavailable… already used", no form. Single-use enforced.

Title: Re-invite revokes the prior token
Notes: Re-invited carol@ -> new token issued (differs from old). carol's OLD token -> "Invitation unavailable"; the NEW token -> valid "Join WakeCap" accept form. Prior link invalidated.

Title: Resend pending invitation
Notes: Clicked Resend on carol's pending invite -> a fresh "You're invited to WakeCap" mail landed in Mailpit (1 message).

Title: Revoke pending invitation
Notes: Revoked alice@'s pending invite (pending count 2->1, row gone). alice's accept link then -> "Invitation unavailable", no form. Revoked link stops working.

Title: Accept attempts are rate-limited
Notes: Accept/register is guarded by an in-house sliding-window limiter: hitRateLimit('invite-register:<id>', 8, 10min) in features/invitation/actions.ts, run BEFORE any Better Auth endpoint (so it's independent of RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED). The limiter (lib/rate-limit) is unit-tested (4 tests pass). Returns 'Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes…' past 8. NOTE: mechanism + unit-test verified; the full 9-submission UI behavioral test was not run.

Title: Set workspace name
Notes: Name field at /admin editable; persists via the same "Save branding" action proven by the accent round-trip; header chrome reflects the workspace name (Riley's Logbook). Not mutated permanently (restored).

Title: Set accent color
Notes: Swatch + validated hex (#e8590c) with live PREVIEW re-tint. Saved -> header logo box + buttons re-themed orange app-wide (persisted). Restored to #5c8a58 and re-saved; chrome green again. Full live-preview + persist + re-theme path verified.

Title: Upload a logo
Notes: POST /api/upload/logo (field 'file', PNG) as owner → 200, organization.logo_key set. Logo serves publicly via /api/files (branding exception) → 200. Sign-in page HTML references the logo key; header screenshot shows the logo replacing the wordmark in chrome.

Title: Branding on pre-auth pages
Notes: Sign-in page shows workspace name/logo/accent (instance brand = Ada's, pre-auth).

Title: Branding on the public share page
Notes: Created a share link on the org doc -> public /share/<token> (200, no auth) carries the WakeCap brand + the doc title (Ada owner 2026) + the brag; no login required.

Title: Branding in emails
Notes: The invitation email is branded with the inviting org (WakeCap present in the mail HTML). (Transactional verify/reset using the instance brand was confirmed on the solo instance.)

Title: Invalid accent rejected
Notes: Entered '#zzzzzz' accent + Save -> refused with 'Use a hex color like #e8590c.'; DB accent unchanged (#5c8a58).

Title: Personal workspace branding
Notes: private-solo personal workspace: /admin shows BRANDING only (Logo + Name & accent), no Members tab; /admin/members redirects to /admin. Owner set accent (#0f766e via wizard) and uploaded a logo (logo_key set) — name/accent/logo all settable with no member surface.

Title: Member list
Notes: Members list shows each member's name/email, role, Joined + Last active dates. Owner row labeled "Owner · You"; after the invite accept it correctly showed 2 members.

Title: Invite multiple at once
Notes: Entered "alice@bragbit.local, carol@bragbit.local" in one submit -> "Pending invitations · 2" with both rows; both invite mails delivered to Mailpit.

Title: Change a member's role
Notes: Bob's role dropdown Member->Admin persisted (DB role=admin), then Admin->Member persisted. Both directions work.

Title: Remove a member
Notes: Remove -> confirm dialog ("lose access immediately, can't be undone") -> membership deleted (member table now owner-only). Account + orphaned document persist (ENH-CO-01 export-on-removal not yet built). BUG FOUND + FIXED (ENH-CQ-07): a removed member could still sign in, then /dashboard,/,/admin looped into ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS. Fix = terminal /no-workspace page + requireWorkspace redirects there. RETESTED: removed member sign-in -> /no-workspace (no loop), all guarded routes funnel there, sign-out recovers, valid users not trapped; typecheck+lint clean. Minor copy bug remains: "WakeCapimmediately" missing a space in the confirm dialog.

Title: Owner protection
Notes: UI-level: the owner row (Ada · Owner · You) has NO role dropdown and NO Remove/Make-owner controls — owner can't be demoted or removed, and can't remove self. (Server-side enforcement not separately probed.)

Title: Transfer ownership
Notes: private-org bragbit_org, 2-member org (Alice owner / Bob member). Clicked Make owner on Bob in /admin/members + confirmed dialog → toast "Ownership transferred.". DB after: Bob=owner, Alice=admin, owner count=1 (atomic swap holds). Old owner lost owner-only actions in UI.

Title: Members can't reach admin
Notes: As the member: /admin and /admin/members both bounce to /dashboard (server redirect). The member's header also has NO "Workspace" link (admin nav hidden for non-admins).

Title: No member surface in solo mode
Notes: Solo workspace /admin shows only a BRANDING tab — no Members tab, no /admin/members link (DOM: 0 elements matching /member/i, 0 member hrefs).

Title: Admins cannot read member brag content
Notes: Member created a PRIVATE brag ("CONFIDENTIAL member raise case" / "comp numbers…"). As owner: member's doc URL renders a not-found page (no title/body leak); /api/export of it -> 404; owner dashboard doesn't list the member's doc; owner search returns 0 result links (apparent "match" was only the query echoed in the search box). No content path exposes the member's brag.

Title: Removed member lands on a terminal page (no redirect loop)
Notes: Removed member signs in -> /no-workspace ('No workspace access' + sign-out), NOT ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS; /dashboard,/,/admin all funnel there; sign-out -> /sign-in; a user with a workspace redirects to /dashboard. Fix = ENH-CQ-07 (src/app/no-workspace).

Title: Member removal hands over a data bundle
Notes: Removing a member emails them a branded bundle (live-verified via Mailpit): bragbit-data.json (every doc+brag, private included) + combined bragbit-wins.md + the uploaded attachment files up to a 20MB cap. Best-effort; never blocks removal. Impl = ENH-CO-01 (features/workspace/offboard).

Title: Create with a title only
Notes: Created 'QA Test Doc' from a title alone; appears on dashboard newest-first.

Title: Create with period + Markdown goals
Notes: Set period 2026-01-01..12-31 + goals via edit; card shows date range + 'goals set'.

Title: Edit a document
Notes: Edited title to 'QA Test Doc (edited)'; saved (toast 'Document updated').

Title: Archive (reversible)
Notes: Archived; left the active list into a restorable 'Archived · 1' disclosure (toast).

Title: Unarchive
Notes: Restored from the archived disclosure back to the active list (toast).

Title: Delete
Notes: Delete shows a confirm with a 'can't be undone' warning; confirming removed it (toast).

Title: Documents are private per user
Notes: SOLO: seeded 2nd user Carol; Carol opens demo's doc → 'could not be found', no content; each sees own. ORG (even for an admin): seeded owner+admin; admin opens owner's doc → not-found, no owner content; owner sees own. getDocument scopes by (workspaceId,userId), role-independent.

Title: Unknown/unowned id
Notes: Authed nav to /documents/<unknown id> -> in-chrome 'Not found' page (app header present) with a 'Back to your documents' link.

Title: Quick-add (title only)
Notes: Quick-add from a title alone ('QA quick-add test win'); 'Win logged' toast, count 5->6, lands at top of current month (Jun 19), solid node.

Title: `n` shortcut
Notes: From a neutral focus, pressing 'n' focused the quick-add input (placeholder 'Log a win…').

Title: Full editor fields
Notes: Opened "Add with details" — all fields present (title, date, category, status, private toggle, description+impact Write/Preview, collaborators, attribution, tags, links, attachments-after-save). Set Technical category; saved; card shows TECHNICAL badge, win count 6→7.

Title: Multiple labeled links
Notes: Links section with ""+ Add link"" (URL + optional label) present and functional in the full editor; existing brags render PR links (e.g. PR #1482).

Title: Markdown is sanitized
Notes: Injected , [bad link](javascript:alert()) and . Preview + persisted card render script/img as literal escaped text (no execution, no alert); javascript: link href stripped to "" (verified via DOM); 0 injected script/img-onerror nodes. react-markdown safe-by-default holds end-to-end.

Title: Edit a brag
Notes: Edited a brag (added a tag) and saved -> change persisted on the card after re-render.

Title: Delete a brag
Notes: Deleted 2 test brags (XSS sanitization test, QA quick-add test win) via the Delete button -> "Delete this brag?" confirm dialog (can't-be-undone copy) -> Delete brag. Cards removed from timeline, win count 7->6->5 (back to seed). Confirm-before-destroy UX present.

Title: Empty-state onboarding
Notes: Formula line shown under quick-add: 'what you did + why it mattered + the measurable result'; placeholder present.

Title: Upload (multi-file)
Notes: Manual upload (user-driven) of Micro-Frontends-in-Production-SAMPLE_1.pdf to a saved brag -> attachments row (application/pdf, 291549 bytes, workspace-prefixed storage_key) + file written under .data/uploads. Chip shows in the editor.

Title: Size cap
Notes: Manual upload of a 26MB bragbit-big.pdf -> rejected with "bragbit-big.pdf exceeds the 25 MB limit." 0 attachment rows, no >20MB object stored. MAX_UPLOAD_MB=25 enforced.

Title: MIME allowlist (whole batch)
Notes: Manual mixed batch [bragbit-avatar.png (allowed) + bragbit-bad.svg (disallowed)] -> "Unsupported file type: bragbit-bad.svg"; DB shows 0 attachments — the valid PNG did NOT partially upload. Whole batch rejected, no partial.

Title: Thumbnails + size
Notes: PDF attachment renders as a file ICON (not an image thumbnail, correct for non-image) with filename + "285 KB" size shown in the editor chip.

Title: Download
Notes: Owner authed GET /api/files/<key> -> 200, Content-Type application/pdf, Content-Length 291549 (matches), Content-Disposition carries the original filename (Micro-Frontends…).

Title: Delete
Notes: Removed the chip (×) + Save changes -> attachments row count 0 AND the stored object deleted from .data/uploads (No such file or directory). Row + object both reaped.

Title: Never publicly addressable
Notes: With a REAL uploaded attachment: owner (authed) gets 200 + full 291549-byte PDF; the exact same /api/files/<key> with NO session -> 404 (9-byte error body, file not served). Never publicly addressable.

Title: S3 storage
Notes: Restarted server STORAGE_DRIVER=s3 against bundled MinIO (endpoint :9000, bucket bragbit, minioadmin). Uploaded a text attachment to demo-brag-jun via POST /api/upload/attachment → 200; object confirmed in MinIO bucket (27B at the key), NOT on local disk. Download via /api/files → 200 + correct bytes; anon → 404. Cleaned object + reverted to local.

Title: Month-grouped timeline
Notes: Month-grouped (Jun/May/Apr/Mar/Feb), sticky headers, per-month '1 WIN' counts, vertical spine; 5 wins total.

Title: Status node + pill
Notes: Solid node = shipped (Jun/Apr/Mar); Feb is hollow node + 'IN PROGRESS' pill.

Title: Private card treatment
Notes: March brag shows 'PRIVATE' badge + dashed border + diagonal hatch treatment.

Title: Detail view
Notes: Clicking a brag title opens a read-only detail dialog: date, category, description, impact box, LINKS (PR #1482), collaborators, tags.

Title: Inline tags
Notes: Type-to-add: 'qa-2026' + Enter -> monochrome #qa-2026 chip beside existing #platform #realtime; the tag then appeared in the workspace tag filter (reused across brags). Reverted after.

Title: Filter by category / tag / date range
Notes: Selected category Technical -> URL ?category=technical-contribution (shareable), timeline re-rendered to the 2 Technical wins grouped by month. "Clear" reset URL to bare doc and restored all 7 wins.

Title: Gap months
Notes: Quiet/gap month marked '· 1 quiet month ·' (the filtered-out private March) between April and February.

Title: Global full-text search
Notes: Header search 'heatmap' -> /search?q=heatmap; '1 result', grouped by document (2026), shows the matching brag.

Title: Deep-link
Notes: Search result card deep-links back into the document/brag.

Title: Search isolation
Notes: Demo searched 'onboarding' (a term only in ANOTHER user's brag) -> '0 results for onboarding', 0 doc links, the other user's brag absent. Search is workspace-isolated.

Title: Create + copy a link
Notes: Created a secret link (/share/<token>); dialog shows copyable URL + Rotate + Stop sharing + Password controls.

Title: Public view
Notes: Public /share/[token] view: branded (Riley's Logbook, green), no app chrome, no login, month-grouped timeline.

Title: Private brags absent
Notes: SECURITY: private March 'Cut the CI pipeline' brag ABSENT from the share; header '5 wins' (not 6); March renders as '1 quiet month' gap.

Title: Footer + noindex
Notes: 'Powered by BragBit' footer present on the public share.

Title: Last opened
Notes: Owner dialog shows 'Not opened yet' before first view (last_accessed_at).

Title: Rotate
Notes: Rotate -> old token /share/<old> -> 404 immediately; new active token minted (DB: old revoked, new active). Old URL dies the instant a new one mints.

Title: Revoke
Notes: After 'Stop sharing', the old /share URL shows a friendly 'This link isn't available' page; no content leaks.

Title: One active link per document
Notes: With an active link present, the share dialog shows the existing link + Rotate/Stop (no second 'Create'); DB had exactly 1 active row (others revoked). One active link per document.

Title: Password locks content
Notes: Password-protected share shows a 'Password required' gate revealing nothing (no title/wins/brags); brand + footer only.

Title: Correct password unlocks
Notes: Correct password unlocks (cookie set); full timeline shows; still '5 wins' so private stays hidden post-unlock.

Title: Wrong password + rate limit
Notes: Wrong password -> ?e=incorrect, red 'Incorrect password. Try again.', content stays locked.

Title: Password change invalidates the cookie
Notes: Unlock cookie is HMAC(secret, shareId:passwordHash). Set argon2 pw on demo share, computed genuine cookie. After changing the password (new argon2 hash) the OLD cookie → 404 (forces re-unlock) while a NEW cookie → 200; removing the password reopens token-only access. Stateless invalidation per unlock.ts.

Title: Attachments over a share
Notes: demo doc share link + attachments on a SHARED brag (jun) and a PRIVATE brag (mar), real files on disk. Anon via ?token=: shared-brag att streams 200; private-brag att 404; no token 404; bogus token 404. Owner session: both 200. Password-gated: token w/o unlock cookie 404, with genuine unlock cookie 200.

Title: Per-brag visibility toggle
Notes: Toggled 'crew heatmap' Private -> card shows a Private badge AND it vanished from the live /share/<token> page (a still-shared brag remained). Exports already exclude private (TC-EXP-02). Reverted after.

Title: Markdown export
Notes: GET /api/export/demo-doc-2026?format=md (authed, Content-Type text/markdown, attachment filename). Contains title 2026, goals, 5 month groups, shared brags (crew heatmap), links (PR #1482), collaborators (N. Osei), tags.

Title: Include-private choice
Notes: Default md (1423b) EXCLUDES the private brag (Cut the CI pipeline absent). ?private=1 (1756b) INCLUDES it. Private opt-in works; off by default.

Title: Print view
Notes: /print/demo-doc-2026 renders branded (Riley's Logbook), metadata+goals, italic month groups (June/May/April), impact/links/collaborators/tags, 4 page-break elements (month-per-page), "Print / Save as PDF" button. Private brag excluded. No-auth -> 307 ->/sign-in.

Title: Save as PDF
Notes: Print view exposes a "Print / Save as PDF" button -> browser print-to-PDF (the deliberate v1 path). Button + branded print layout verified; actual PDF render is the browser's native dialog (not automatable here).

Title: JSON export
Notes: GET /api/export/data (authed) -> 1 document (other users' docs scoped out), all 5 brags incl. the PRIVATE one, with links (1482), tags (realtime), collaborators (Osei).

Title: Export is owner-only
Notes: No-auth: doc/data/unowned export all -> 401. Authed: own=200, unowned doc id (another workspace) -> 404, missing id -> 404. Workspace+user scoped.

Title: Opt in
Notes: Settings -> Weekly reminders: enabled checkbox, Day=Friday, TZ=Europe/London (full IANA list). Helper changed to "We'll email you on Friday mornings (Europe/London)"; toast "Reminder settings saved." Restored to off + re-saved. (Actual email delivery TC-REM-02 still needs Mailpit + cron.)

Title: Reminder email
Notes: Set reminder Fri/Atlantic-Cape_Verde (9am-now zone), POST /api/cron/reminders with CRON_SECRET -> {ok,sent:1}. Mailpit: "What did you ship this week?" to demo@bragbit.local, workspace-branded, quick-add link -> /dashboard, unsubscribe link present.

Title: Dedup
Notes: 2nd cron POST immediately -> sent:0; Mailpit still 1 message. last_reminded_at within the 20h dedup window suppresses the resend.

Title: One-click unsubscribe
Notes: GET /unsubscribe/<uid>/<token> rendered a confirm and left reminder_enabled=true (GET inert). Clicking "Turn off weekly reminders" (POST) -> "You're unsubscribed" (?done=1); DB reminder_enabled flipped to false. No login required (token-authorized route).

Title: Invalid unsubscribe token
Notes: Tampered token -> "This link isn't valid" page; HMAC verifyUnsubscribeToken rejects forgery (no opt-out performed).

Title: Cron route is secured
Notes: POST /api/cron/reminders with no Authorization and with a wrong Bearer both -> 401 {"error":"Unauthorized"}. (Secret is configured, so 503-unconfigured path not hit.)

Title: One-command stack
Notes: Clean slate (dev stack down -v). docker compose up -d --build (production docker-compose.yml) built image + started in ~54s. docker compose ps: app + postgres both (healthy).

Title: Migrations on start
Notes: docker compose logs app shows '[entrypoint] applying database migrations…' → '[migrate] database is up to date' BEFORE '▲ Next.js' / '✓ Ready'. Schema present on the fresh DB (organization table queryable).

Title: First-run wizard
Notes: Fresh compose DB: GET http://localhost:3000/ → 307 → /setup (private-solo first-run). Confirmed via curl.

Title: MinIO profile
Notes: Set STORAGE_DRIVER=s3 + S3_* (endpoint http://minio:9000) in .env; docker compose --profile minio up -d started minio + minio-init ('minio bucket ready'). Uploaded attachment via prod app → object in compose MinIO bucket (22B at key); download via app 200 + correct bytes; anon 404.

Title: Fail-fast on bad config
Notes: Emptied BETTER_AUTH_SECRET in .env, recreated app. Logs show clear repeated error: 'Invalid environment variables: • BETTER_AUTH_SECRET: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET is required' (zod safeParse in src/lib/env.ts); app never becomes healthy, GET / → 500. DATABASE_URL validated identically (z.string().min(1)) but overridden by compose.

Title: Data persists
Notes: Completed setup wizard (Deploy Workspace + deploy@bragbit.local). docker compose down (no -v) then up -d: named volumes (bragbit_bragbit_pgdata/_uploads) survived, app healthy, org + user data intact.

Title: Backup & restore
Notes: Per backup-and-upgrades.md: docker compose exec postgres pg_dump → dump. Restored into a FRESH DB (bragbit_restore) with 0 errors; data intact (Deploy Workspace, deploy@bragbit.local verified, member). Files-volume tar archive command works (uploads volume empty — no attachments in this instance).

Title: Upgrade
Notes: docker compose up -d --build (simulated upgrade) recreated the app container; entrypoint migrate ran idempotently ('[migrate] database is up to date'); app came back healthy; data survived (Deploy Workspace, deploy@bragbit.local).

Title: Demo seed
Notes: Ran pnpm seed:demo against the compose DB (temp-published postgres port). '[seed:demo] ✓ demo seeded'. Demo login via prod app → HTTP 200; '2026' document with 5 brags present.

Title: Health endpoint
Notes: GET /api/health — both paths verified live via curl: with Postgres stopped → 503 {status:error}, restarted → 200 {status:ok}. Also unit-tested in src/app/api/health/route.test.ts (db.execute mocked). The compose healthcheck now probes /api/health (r.ok), and a full docker build on node:26-alpine confirms the route ships in the prod image.

Title: Security headers
Notes: curl -I /sign-in (prod build): nosniff, X-Frame-Options DENY, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, HSTS (max-age 31536000; includeSubDomains), and the CSP now via src/proxy.ts = base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'nonce-…' 'strict-dynamic' (no unsafe-eval in prod). All expected headers present.

Title: Auth rate limiting (production)
Notes: Verified via the new RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED toggle (no prod build needed): with it on, 6 rapid wrong sign-ins to /api/auth/sign-in/email -> 401,401,401,429,429,429 (Better Auth built-in 3/10s rule). Back on dev defaults, 4 rapid attempts all 401 (limiter off in dev as designed).

Title: Tenant isolation
Notes: private-org, 2 members same org, each with own docs/brags (unique private 'secret' terms) + Alice share link + on-disk attachment. Probed every surface by-ID with Bob's session vs Alice's: docs→not-found/no content; export→404; attachment→"Not found" (anon 404; owner gets file); search→0 cross-user both ways (own queries return own); public share shows only shared brag, never private brag/term. Positive controls all pass. Note: Bob→Alice doc page returns HTTP 200 rendering not-found UI (Next streaming quirk, no leak).

Title: Private never leaks
Notes: Private brag never leaks into the share payload (verified via the public view).

Title: Attachments never public
Notes: Proven with a REAL attachment: /api/files/<key> serves the PDF only to the authed owner (200); no session -> 404. Print/export routes also 401/307 without auth. Attachments require an owner session (share-token path is TC-SHARE-13, separate).

Title: Dead tokens
Notes: Revoked share token resolves to a friendly not-found (no leak); same path for unknown/expired tokens.

Title: CSP script-src nonce
Notes: Verified on a production build: each /sign-in load has a fresh script-src 'nonce-…' in the CSP header matching the nonce on all 23 Next <script> tags; loaded in a real browser → zero console CSP violations, page interactive (Sonner region hydrated); no unsafe-eval in prod. Also unit-tested in src/proxy.test.ts (fresh-nonce-per-request).

Title: Mobile layout
Notes: Narrowed window to its min (eff. 544px viewport, below Tailwind sm=640 so the mobile branch is active): header collapses to logo-icon only, doc action buttons + filters wrap, timeline single-column, zero horizontal overflow (scrollWidth==clientWidth). Note: desktop-Chrome window floor blocked a literal 375px; mobile layout branch nonetheless exercised.

Title: Loading states
Notes: Loading skeletons wired on the exact routes named: app/(app)/dashboard/loading.tsx + search/loading.tsx; Next renders them during navigation suspense. Verified by the wired files (fast local render not caught mid-flight).

Title: Error boundary
Notes: Error boundary app/(app)/error.tsx renders 'An unexpected error interrupted this page. Try again…' with a reset/'Try again' button. Verified by the wired boundary (not force-triggered).

Title: Not-found
Notes: Unknown/unowned document -> in-chrome 'Not found' (app/(app)/not-found.tsx): 'This page or document doesn't exist, or you don't have access' + back link. Verified live.

Title: Entry templates (action-verb scaffolds)
Notes: All six 'Start from' chips render under quick-add. 'Shipped a project' opens the editor in create mode pre-filled: category=Shipped work, status=Shipped, today's date, description scaffold seeded; title/impact empty. Status-less 'Led an initiative' leaves status empty. Zero console/CSP violations. Verified in-browser on the private-solo demo workspace.
